seoTitle: Sturt vs Summertown — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Sturt and Summertown. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Sturt and Summertown.
heading: Sturt vs Summertown — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Sturt, South Australia and Summertown, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Sturt has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Summertown (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Sturt or Summertown safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Sturt has a flood risk score of 38/100, while Summertown scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Sturt scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Summertown scores 61/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Sturt or Summertown?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Sturt has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.48% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
